title: Mode Maze
description: Navigate a cave with terrain-dependent equipment using Dijkstra.
writeup:
## Approach

Compute terrain types from erosion levels (geologic index + depth mod 20183, then mod 3). Each terrain restricts which equipment you can carry.

## Part 1

Sum terrain types (risk levels) in the rectangle from (0,0) to the target.

## Part 2

Dijkstra on state (x, y, equipment). Moving costs 1 minute, switching equipment costs 7. Each terrain type forbids one of the three equipment options, so at each cell only one switch is possible. The grid is extended with a margin beyond the target since optimal paths may detour.
